ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "size_uk" TEXT /* UK size equivalent */,
  "size_usa" TEXT /* USA size equivalent */,
  "size_eur" TEXT /* EUR size equivalent */,
  "size_aus" TEXT /* AUS size equivalent */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Women, Men, Kids, Unisex) */,
  "size_gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended */,
  "size_age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size is intended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of measurements */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size these measurements correspond to */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Inseam length measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "chest_depth" TEXT /* Chest depth measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "hip_circumference" TEXT /* Hip circumference measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_system" TEXT /* The size system the customer prefers (UK, USA, EUR, AUS) */,
  "default_size" TEXT /* The customer's default size in their preferred size system */,
  "customer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer */,
  "customer_height" TEXT /* Height of the customer in inches and centimeters */,
  "customer_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the customer in pounds and kilograms */,
  "customer_body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the customer */,
  "customer_preferences" TEXT /* Additional preferences (e.g., preferred styles, colors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_default_size FOREIGN KEY ("default_size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_label")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the clothing item */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the inventory is located */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available in that size and region */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for triggering a reorder of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item purchased */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items purchased */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the order to which the purchase belongs */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the item was shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address from which the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (e.g., Dress, Jacket, Shirt) */,
  "item_gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the item is intended */,
  "item_age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the item is intended */,
  "item_material" TEXT /* Material of the item */,
  "item_care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the item */,
  "item_size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a size chart specific to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "fit_accuracy" INTEGER /* Rating for how accurately the item fits */,
  "comfort_level" INTEGER /* Rating for the comfort level of the item */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Rating for the durability of the item */,
  "value_for_money" INTEGER /* Rating for the value for money of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who is receiving the recommendation */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* The recommended size for the customer */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "reason_for_recommendation" TEXT /* Description of why the size was recommended */,
  "source_of_recommendation" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "virtual_fittings" (
  "fitting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virtual fitting session */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who used the virtual fitting room */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item the customer tried on virtually */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the virtual fitting session occurred */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit from the customer's perspective */,
  "fit_accuracy_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for how accurately the virtual fitting reflects the actual fit */,
  "fit_advice" TEXT /* Advice or notes from the virtual fitting session */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the virtual fitting session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fitting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_fittings_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_fittings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
